environments.name: local
environments.notes: Example only. Copy this file and record the real environment decision before enabling renamed_contract mode.

affectedContracts.strategy: Route new starts to MoonMind.UserWorkflow on the renamed-contract Task Queue; keep MoonMind.Run on the legacy worker queue until in-flight histories drain.
Deploy renamed activity payload shapes only with the renamed-contract worker build; do not serve legacy and renamed activity payloads from the same worker build.
Route pre-cutover signals to legacy MoonMind.Run histories and post-cutover signals to MoonMind.UserWorkflow histories; do not add compatibility aliases.
Route pre-cutover updates to legacy MoonMind.Run histories and post-cutover updates to MoonMind.UserWorkflow histories; do not add compatibility aliases.
